mapper.select: SELECT b.brand_name, m.model_name, m.model_year, m.trim_name, COUNT(*)::INT AS sales_volume, SUM(so.total_amount)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS sales_amount FROM sales_order so JOIN vehicle v ON v.vehicle_vin = so.vehicle_vin JOIN model m ON m.model_id = v.model_id JOIN brand b ON b.brand_id = m.brand_id WHERE so.order_status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY b.brand_name, m.model_name, m.model_year, m.trim_name ORDER BY sales_volume DESC, b.brand_name, m.model_name LIMIT #{topN}
SELECT stat_year, stat_month, staff_id, staff_name, order_count, sales_amount, gross_profit FROM fn_get_monthly_report(#{year}, #{month})
